description: Daisy, Fitz, and Simmons regroup after escaping captivity. Fitz removes Simmons' implant in a tense moment as they prepare to head for Fitz's ship. Their hopes are dashed when they see the Kree destroy their way out, heightening their sense of desperation.

transcript.line: Find me some clothes.
What's the plan, Fitz?
Uh, I have a ship. We get there, then comes the plan.
Hey, how's your head?
I'll tell you when the ringing stops. By the way, “fight to the death?” Really?
Yeah, well, I had to make a splashy entrance.
Yeah, well, you could have jumped in the octagon yourself, then.
Well, wouldn't be fair. I do push-ups now. Double digits. So...
You have no idea how good it is to see you. You're here with a spaceship. Seems impossible.
Nothing is impossible anymore.
Full story later.
Yeah, there will be pints.
There will be gin. Oh! Oh, my God!
Whoa.
Her implant. They must be messing with it.
Well, what... what... what do we do?
Get it out.
Okay. Hey, hey, hey. Jemma. Jemma. This is gonna hurt. I've got it. I've got it.
Aah! Aaaah!
We got to go! Come on.
There's the ship. Just got to get past...
Don't tell me that was...
Our way out.
